ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Once you've signed in, click here to continue

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable or disable the inline copilot. This will also start the copilot server.
ast.target: 启用或禁用内联 Copilot。这也会启动 Copilot 服务器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The path to your node binary (at least Node v22). This is used to run the copilot server.
ast.target: 您的 Node 二进制文件路径（至少 Node v22）。用于运行 Copilot 服务器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The delay in milliseconds before generating suggestions. Default is 500ms.
ast.target: 生成建议前的延迟（毫秒）。默认为 500ms。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only show suggestions when the 'request' keybinding is pressed. Default is false.
ast.target: 仅在按下 'request' 快捷键时显示建议。默认为 false。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only show suggestions when the cursor is inside a code block. Default is false.
ast.target: 仅在光标位于代码块内时显示建议。默认为 false。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, certain settings (only the node path for now) will be saved to a separate file. This is useful when using the same vault on multiple devices. Default is false.
ast.target: 如果启用，某些设置（目前仅限节点路径）将保存到单独的文件中。当在多个设备上使用同一个保险库时，这很有用。默认为 false。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set up a proxy for the copilot service. Should start with http:// or https://.
ast.target: 为 Copilot 服务设置代理。应以 http:// 或 https:// 开头。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable logging for debugging purposes. Logs are written to the console.
ast.target: 启用日志记录以进行调试。日志将写入控制台。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the Copilot Chat sidebar automatically when Obsidian loads. Default is true.
ast.target: Obsidian 加载时自动打开 Copilot 聊天侧边栏。默认为 true。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable or disable markdown rendering in chat messages. When disabled, messages will be displayed as plain text with basic formatting.
ast.target: 启用或禁用聊天消息中的 Markdown 渲染。禁用时，消息将以纯文本形式显示，并带有基本格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, pressing Enter will create a new line and Shift+Enter will send the message. By default, Enter sends the message and Shift+Enter creates a new line.
ast.target: 启用后，按 Enter 键将创建新行，Shift+Enter 键将发送消息。默认情况下，Enter 键发送消息，Shift+Enter 键创建新行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Custom GitHub Enterprise hostname (e.g. company.ghe.com). Leave blank to use github.com. Changing this requires re-authentication.
ast.target: 自定义 GitHub Enterprise 主机名（例如 company.ghe.com）。留空则使用 github.com。更改此设置需要重新认证。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter the path to your node binary.
ast.target: 输入您的 node 二进制文件路径。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: This will test the path and verify the version of node.
ast.target: 这将测试路径并验证 node 的版本。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Note that this will start the copilot service in the background.
ast.target: 请注意，这将在后台启动 copilot 服务。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: KaTeX doesn't work in quirks mode. Make sure your website has a suitable doctype.
ast.target: 警告：KaTeX 在怪异模式下无法工作。请确保您的网站具有合适的文档类型。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Cluster without external connections, without a parent and with children
ast.target: 无外部连接、无父节点且有子节点的集群

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 从递归渲染 XAX 返回

ast.name: warn
ast.source: flowchart-elk was moved to an external package in Mermaid v11. Please refer [release notes](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/releases/tag/v11.0.0) for more details. This diagram will be rendered using `dagre` layout as a fallback.
ast.target: flowchart-elk 在 Mermaid v11 中已移至外部包。请参阅[发布说明](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/releases/tag/v11.0.0)了解更多详情。此图表将使用 `dagre` 布局作为后备方案进行渲染。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The difference between the min and max time is more than 5 years. This will cause performance issues. Skipping drawing exclude days.
ast.target: 最小和最大时间之间的差异超过 5 年。这会导致性能问题。跳过绘制排除日期。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: ⚠️ Invalid or missing stateId from key:
ast.target: ⚠️ 来自键的无效或缺失 stateId：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: ⚠️ Could not find node matching text:
ast.target: ⚠️ 无法找到匹配文本的节点：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: ⚠️ Node has no parent, cannot wrap:
ast.target: ⚠️ 节点无父节点，无法包装：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Graph contains a negative weight cycle for Bellman-Ford
ast.target: 图包含 Bellman-Ford 算法的负权重环

ast.name: warn
ast.source: You have set a custom wheel sensitivity.  This will make your app zoom unnaturally when using mainstream mice.  You should change this value from the default only if you can guarantee that all your users will use the same hardware and OS configuration as your current machine.
ast.target: 您已设置自定义滚轮灵敏度。这将使您的应用在使用主流鼠标时缩放不自然。仅当您能保证所有用户都使用与您当前机器相同的硬件和操作系统配置时，才应更改此默认值。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The `cutrectangle` node shape can not be used at small sizes so `rectangle` is used instead
ast.target: `cutrectangle` 节点形状在小尺寸下无法使用，因此改用 `rectangle`

ast.name: warn
ast.source: A Cytoscape container has style position:static and so can not use UI extensions properly
ast.target: Cytoscape 容器的样式位置为 static，因此无法正确使用 UI 扩展

ast.name: warn
ast.source: mermaid.init is deprecated. Please use run instead.
ast.target: mermaid.init 已弃用。请改用 run。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Copilot is not ready yet! Please check your settings.
ast.target: Copilot 尚未就绪！请检查您的设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to securely store credentials. Please try again.
ast.target: 无法安全存储凭据。请重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: GitHub Copilot credentials have been migrated to secure storage.
ast.target: GitHub Copilot 凭据已迁移到安全存储。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to migrate credentials to secure storage. Please re-authenticate.
ast.target: 无法将凭据迁移到安全存储。请重新进行身份验证。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to fetch device code. Please try again.
ast.target: 无法获取设备代码。请重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to fetch PAT. Please try again.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to fetch token. Please try again.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You need to be authenticated to send messages
ast.target: 您需要先进行身份验证才能发送消息

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to get a response from GitHub Copilot
ast.target: 无法从 GitHub Copilot 获取响应

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 无法加载对话历史记录

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 无法保存对话历史记录

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 无可用的设备代码数据

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: [GitHub Copilot] Please set the path to your node executable in the settings to use autocomplete feature.
ast.target: [GitHub Copilot] 请在设置中设置您的 node 可执行文件路径以使用自动补全功能。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: [GitHub Copilot] Copilot has changed the minimum node version to 22. Please update your node version if you are using an older version.
ast.target: [GitHub Copilot] Copilot 已将最低 node 版本更改为 22。如果您使用的是旧版本，请更新您的 node 版本。

ast.name: body
ast.source: <g><rect width="80" height="80" style="fill: #087ebf; stroke-width: 0px;"/><text transform="translate(21.16 64.67)" style="fill: #fff; font-family: ArialMT, Arial; font-size: 67.75px;"><tspan x="0" y="0">?</tspan></text></g>
ast.target: <g><rect width=\"80\" height=\"80\" style=\"fill: #087ebf; stroke-width: 0px;\"/><text transform=\"translate(21.16 64.67)\" style=\"fill: #fff; font-family: ArialMT, Arial; font-size: 67.75px;\"><tspan x=\"0\" y=\"0\">?</tspan></text></g>

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render math in display mode, which puts the math in display style (so \int and \sum are large, for example), and centers the math on the page on its own line.
ast.target: 以显示模式渲染数学公式，这将使数学公式采用显示样式（例如，\\int 和 \\sum 会变大），并将数学公式居中显示在页面的独立行上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the markup language of the output.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render display math in leqno style (left-justified tags).
ast.target: 以 leqno 样式（左对齐标签）渲染显示数学公式。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 将显示数学公式左对齐渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Makes \color behave like LaTeX's 2-argument \textcolor, instead of LaTeX's one-argument \color mode change.
ast.target: 使 \\color 的行为类似于 LaTeX 的双参数 \\textcolor，而不是 LaTeX 的单参数 \\color 模式更改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turn on strict / LaTeX faithfulness mode, which throws an error if the input uses features that are not supported by LaTeX.
ast.target: 开启严格 / LaTeX 忠实模式，如果输入使用了 LaTeX 不支持的功能，将抛出错误。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trust the input, enabling all HTML features such as \url.
ast.target: 信任输入，启用所有 HTML 功能，例如 \\url。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limit the number of macro expansions to the specified number, to prevent e.g. infinite macro loops. If set to Infinity, the macro expander will try to fully expand as in LaTeX.
ast.target: 将宏展开次数限制为指定次数，以防止例如无限宏循环。如果设置为 Infinity，宏展开器将尝试像 LaTeX 一样完全展开。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fork or join in process flow

ast.name: description
ast.source: Markdown-ish syntax for generating flowcharts, mindmaps, sequence diagrams, class diagrams, gantt charts, git graphs and more.
ast.target: 一种类似Markdown的语法，用于生成流程图、思维导图、序列图、类图、甘特图、Git图等。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This Object indicates the Parser is during Recording Phase
ast.target: 此对象表示解析器正处于录制阶段

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keybinding to accept word per word suggestions.
ast.target: 逐词接受建议的快捷键。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keybinding to view the next suggestion if available.
ast.target: 查看下一个可用建议的快捷键。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keybinding to enable or disable copilot suggestions.
ast.target: 启用或禁用Copilot建议的快捷键。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Folders and files to exclude from suggestions.
ast.target: 从建议中排除的文件夹和文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hotkey to start a new chat conversation.
ast.target: 开始新聊天对话的快捷键。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hotkey to open or close the conversation history panel.
ast.target: 打开或关闭对话历史面板的快捷键。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hotkey to delete the current conversation.
ast.target: 删除当前对话的快捷键。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hotkey to focus the chat message input field.
ast.target: 聚焦聊天消息输入框的快捷键。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hotkey to focus the AI model selector dropdown.
ast.target: 聚焦AI模型选择下拉菜单的快捷键。

ast.name: message
ast.source:
Warning: No LINE_BREAKS Found.
	This Lexer has been defined to track line and column information,
	But none of the Token Types can be identified as matching a line terminator.
	See https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/resolving_lexer_errors.html#LINE_BREAKS 
	for details.
ast.target:
警告：未找到换行符。
	此词法分析器已定义用于跟踪行和列信息，
	但没有任何标记类型可被识别为匹配行终止符。
	详情请参阅 https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/resolving_lexer_errors.html#LINE_BREAKS 
	。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 已将分支 feature 合并到 main

ast.name: message
ast.target: 已将 [object Object] 拣选到 release

ast.name: name
ast.source:
This CSTNode indicates the Parser is in Recording Phase
	See: https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/internals.html#grammar-recording for details
ast.target: 此CST节点表示解析器处于录制阶段\n\t详情请参阅：https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/internals.html#grammar-recording

ast.name: text
ast.source: When authenticating in Copilot Chat, a personal token will be encrypted and stored as a file in the plugin folder. This file is called `secure-credentials.dat`. It is only decrytable by your machine but you should never share it with anyone.
ast.target: 在Copilot Chat中进行身份验证时，个人令牌将被加密并作为文件存储在插件文件夹中。此文件名为 `secure-credentials.dat`。它只能由您的机器解密，但您绝不应与任何人共享。
